nodes.name: Global Config (Refined)
nodes.notes:
🔒 SECURE GLOBAL CONFIG

✅ Benefits:
• Centralized configuration
• Environment variable support
• Credential management
• Status mappings
• Error templates
• Helper functions
• Runtime validation

🔧 Setup:
1. Store API keys in n8n credentials
2. Use {{ $credentials.serviceName.property }} syntax
3. Override with env vars in production

⚠️ Security:
• Never hardcode API keys
• Use n8n credential manager
• Rotate keys regularly
• Implement access controls
